summary.title: User Authentication System
summary.description:
- DFD: User -> Web Server -> Session Manager -> User Database.
- Threats:
  1. Spoofing: Credential stuffing on login. Mitigation: MFA, Rate limiting.
  2. Tampering: Session token manipulation. Mitigation: Signed/Encrypted tokens.
  3. Information Disclosure: Plaintext passwords in DB. Mitigation: Argon2 hashing.
  4. Denial of Service: Brute force exhausting resources. Mitigation: Account lockout.
